programmes.show_name: We Still Steal the Old Way
programmes.show_description: Crime drama sequel with Ian Ogilvy. After a daring heist puts them away in Britain's toughest prison, an aging criminal outfit encounters a nemesis intent on settling an old score.
Fast-paced action thriller with Craig Fairbrass. When the Russian mob kidnaps the daughter of a Leeds gangster, he asks an old friend from his SAS days to bring them down and bring her home.
Horror Channel returns soon.

A woman sues her nephew for allegedly slamming a log through her bedroom window and then coming back hours later to vandalize her car.
A cold-press juicer and a waitress have a whirlwind romance that ends with a fight over an unpaid loan, a mattress and harassment.
A woman loses custody of her children after remaining in the same home as a sex offender family member; she is sued by her sister-in-law for childcare costs.
Two days after their son is born, unwed parents dissolve their shared living arrangement; a restraining order and alleged harassment soon follow.
Friends for over 20 years end their relationship when an untenable living arrangement and a car impound come to light.
A man sues his former landlord for $5,000 for property damage, theft and harassment.
A party planner sues her former friends for failure to pay for services rendered for a birthday party.

When Danny Dyke tried playing the hardened drug dealer, he found himself in over his head, but it was his murderers who ended up having sleepless nights.
When Michael Barber finds his wife Susan in bed with another man, she realises she has to take drastic measures to stop him leaving, but no one could suspect how far she would go.
In East Sussex, UK, Lewis Ashdown murdered YouTuber Marc Williams after pressuring him to drink excessively. He filmed the entire attack and was and sentenced to life in prison.
In the US, Lori Isenberg poisoned her husband but told authorities he had drowned, to cover up her fraud. She was eventually caught and pleaded guilty to second degree murder.

In a post-apocalyptic settlement, an old man in a cave offers guidance to survivors, but their orderly world is shattered by the arrival of four soldiers.
A wealthy and cantankerous old inventor manages to make life difficult for his greedy niece even after he dies.
Thriller with Michael Caine. A journalist and his son go in search of a band of modern-day pirates preying on luxury yachts in the Caribbean, but end up kidnapped and forced to join the crew.
Sci-fi thriller with James Caan. After a race of aliens fleeing slavery seeks shelter on Earth, one of them becomes a cop, and is paired with a bigoted human partner to investigate a murder.
Heart-pounding thriller with Mel Gibson. A veteran bomb squad officer races against time - and a ticking explosive device - to save an IT technician taken hostage by a terrorist mastermind.
Crime thriller with Geoff Bell. A gang of crooks plan to steal millions of pounds from a London exchange bank, but things go horribly wrong and the thieves are forced to take hostages.

Sarah Ludemann and Rachel Wade are dating the same boy. Instead of being mad at him, they take out their revenge on each other, leaving Sarah stabbed to death in the street.
When Jennifer Pan calls police about a home invasion killing her parents, investigators think she's innocent. That is, until her story doesn't add up and proves she is the killer.

Tense thriller with Josh Hartnett. An unfortunate case of mistaken identity leaves an ordinary man with the task of paying off a debt to an underworld kingpin by assassinating a rival mobster.
